rulings.Case Title: CHERYL MORONG VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, AUGUST 31, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT GRAYBAR ELECTRIC COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORY RESPONSES OF PLAINTIFF UNDER ANDREWS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO EXPLAIN THE DELAY AND WHAT EVIDENCE WILL BE OBTAINED BY THE CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE DECEDENT WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS FROM DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN P BURNS VS. THE NEIMAN MARCUS GROUP, INC., A DELAWARE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant The Neiman Marcus Group, Inc.'S Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, AUGUST 31, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT THE NEIMAN MARCUS GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT: HEARING REQUIRED TO ADDRESS THE APPLICATION OF SUN-N-SAND AND JOFFE TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, IN PARTICULAR FOR CHECKS WITHOUT PLAINTIFF'S SIGNATURE AND CHECKS FOR PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT BUT USED FOR YOUNG'S ACCOUNT. DEMURRER TO SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FACTS DO NOT ALLEGE A FRAUDULENT ENDORSEMENT UNDER COMMERCIAL CODE SECTION 3103 (A)(7) AND 3405(B). THE COMMENT TO 3420(A) MAKES CLEAR PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM FOR CONVERSION. THE ACCOUNTING CAUSE OF ACTION TURNS ON THE RULING TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/PJM)
